reauthorization_history.reason_for_correction: The raw submit response showed a prequeue upload failure, while the historical parser treated submit_id presence alone as proof of provider task creation. Human Web UI observation found no visible corresponding task.

F06_recovery_readiness_budget_review.exact_next_allowed_action: A separate exact human authorization may activate one F06 recovery submit-only phase. No Dreamina action is currently authorized.

F06_single_recovery_submit_only_authorit.exact_next_allowed_action: Proceed only to the separate CAL-001 authorization-serialization Source and compiler checkpoint decision. F07 remains unauthorized; no Dreamina or provider action is authorized.

F06_recovery_visual_review_and_technical.review_authority: ChatGPT Pro visual review based on uploaded source video and 3x2 contact sheet

latest_live_execution.fail_reason: upload resource "productions/chi_yan_tian_qiong/locked_refs/A-CH-B-IDENTITY-002_locked_shuangji_face_upper_body_identity_anchor.png": upload image: upload phase, no file upload, please check log for more details

exact_next_action: Review both F07 prequeue upload failures and choose a route reset outside the stopped CLI submit route. No third F07 submit, query, download, retry, resubmit, batch, or F08 action is authorized.
durable_evidence_requirements: Persist a sanitized subprocess evidence envelope atomically for every live operation before advancing durable state.
Persist parsed operation evidence with hashes and bind it to experiment_id, wave_id, operation kind, and operation count.
Persist submit_id, logid, numeric credit_count, pre/post balances, and reconciled delta before any later task submit.
Persist query evidence before incrementing query_count and stop immediately on success, fail, or the third unresolved query.
Persist download evidence, local media path/hash, metadata, validation, extracted-frame paths, contact-sheet path, technical record path, and dataset update status before technically_completed.
Commit and push all valid text evidence and state changes before any benign mid-wave pause.
Treat durable atomic subprocess-evidence persistence failure as an immediate stop condition.
duplicate_prevention_rules: Submit is allowed only from preflight_passed when submit_attempt_count=0 and submit_id is null.
Set submit_started_evidence_pending before invoking submit and never invoke submit again for that experiment_id.
Query is allowed only for the recorded submit_id while query_count is below 3 and no terminal query result is recorded.
Download is allowed only once after success with exactly zero images and one video.
No operation may repeat when its durable count or evidence path already records completion.
No new task submit is allowed while any earlier task is unresolved or evidence is ambiguous.
Every resume must revalidate repository, Source, accepted hashes, package, Prompt, fixture, command binding, and duplicate-operation state.

The one authorized F06 recovery submit must create a new submit_id different from cabfa6ab-cc61-4d29-8630-da01dfdeef65; the old handle remains quarantined and may not be reused, queried, or downloaded.
After one F06 recovery submit invocation, close execution authority regardless of success or failure; no retry or second recovery submit is authorized.
The one authorized F07 recovery submit was consumed; both F07 submit handles remain quarantined and no third F07 submit is permitted.
After the second F07 prequeue upload failure, the F07 CLI submit route is stopped and requires a separate human route-reset decision.
benign_pause_rules: A benign Goal boundary is allowed only at a durable task boundary with no ambiguous or in-flight operation.
Before pausing, all valid text evidence and state changes must be committed and pushed.
Resume from the exact next allowed action recorded in this contract; do not infer or replay an earlier action.
A benign boundary does not authorize retry, resubmit, replacement, skipping, or concurrency.
stop_conditions: Repository checkpoint or accepted integrity mismatch
Expected experiment, Prompt, package, fixture, or manifest row mismatch
Duplicate or unrecognized prior submit or completion
Dreamina runtime command behavior or command-binding change
Login, logger, upload, provider, safety, Web-confirmation, or account anomaly
Submit does not create an unambiguous task
Required submit_id, logid, or credit_count evidence missing
Result count not exactly zero images and one video
required_stop_response: Preserve valid evidence where governance permits
closure_rules: Any stop condition changes macro state to STOPPED_AUTHORITY_CLOSED and closes remaining authority immediately.
A stopped wave changes to stopped; the current task changes to terminal_failure or stopped_anomaly as evidence requires.
After all 77 remaining tasks are technically completed, change macro state to ALL_REMAINING_TASKS_TECHNICALLY_COMPLETED_AUTHORITY_CLOSED.
Automatic closure after 77 completions does not select a family winner, select a global Prompt winner, authorize CAL001B, modify Source, finalize media, or lock.
A separate human-governed visual-review and final calibration decision is required after technical completion.
